title: Document TempDir keep-alive at spawn_relay call site
description: In e2e_payment.rs line 116: let (relay_url, _relay_db_dir) = spawn_relay().await — the underscore prefix on _relay_db_dir signals intentional discard to readers, but the reason (dropping it deletes the SQLite DB the relay is using) is not stated at the call site. The function doc explains the return type, but a brief comment at the binding (// keep alive: dropping deletes the relay DB) would prevent a future reader from 'cleaning up' the unused variable.
